label: New — Home & Favourites
items: Plants, Watchlist and Nursery each now have two tabs: Home (everything in your current home, shared with everyone in it) and Favourites (your personal saved list).
Tap the heart on anything in the Home tab to save it to your Favourites — and your Favourites follow you between homes, so you never lose a variety, plant or pest you want to remember.
From Favourites, 'Add to this home' drops a copy into whichever home you're in.
Editing a plant that came from the plant library or AI now saves it as your own copy, leaving the shared original untouched.
Tier limits are respected: you can see AI- and species-database items shared in your home, but saving or adding those stays on the plans that include those features.
